## Description

Fix detector toggle flicker and state not persisting

## Changes

- Changed `DetectorInfo` and `PassthroughSuggestionDto` from positional records to classes
  with settable properties so `System.Text.Json` can deserialize `Enabled` correctly
- Moved `detectorStates` update before the API call (optimistic) with revert on failure
